message:
fix(ru-sync): prevent memory exhaustion from large process output

The sync service was reading entire stdout/stderr into memory using
Response.text(), which could cause OOM errors when syncing repos
with large git outputs (e.g., many changed files, large diffs).

Changes:
- Add readStreamSafe() helper with configurable max bytes (5MB default)
- Stream-based reading with early truncation at limit
- Drain up to 5x limit to prevent pipe blocking before cancel
- Add [TRUNCATED] marker when output is cut off
- Apply to both stdout and stderr capture

This prevents memory issues while still capturing useful output for
debugging sync failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
